title: RefundRequested v1
description: Emitted by payment-domain (via outbox) when a refund has been requested for a captured payment. Published to refunds.lifecycle.v1.

schema_version.description: Monotonic integer version of this schema encoded as a string. Consumers MUST skip (and warn on) unknown versions.

message_id.description: Globally unique message identifier. Used as idempotency key by consumers (inbox/dedup pattern).

correlation_id.description: Propagated across all services in the same business transaction. Set once at the transaction boundary.

causation_id.description: message_id of the upstream message that caused this one. Omitted at the start of a causal chain.

occurred_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the event occurred (not published). Must include timezone (Z or offset).

refund_id.description: Authoritative refund identifier owned by payment-domain.

merchant_id.description: Identifier of the merchant who owns the payment.

provider_id.description: External payment provider handling the refund.

provider_reference.description: Provider's own refund identifier. Absent on refund.requested (not yet assigned).

status.description: Refund status at the time this event was emitted.

reason.description: Optional refund reason supplied by the merchant.
